description_long: This object is a spherical plum with a dark, metallic blue-gray skin, featuring subtle patches of reddish-brown and hints of lighter gray. The surface is glossy, reflecting a strong highlight, and appears smooth with some minor irregularities and mottling typical of natural fruit skin. The coloration is uneven, with some areas showing more concentrated rust-like tones, suggesting natural ripening or weathering. There are no visible stems or leaves attached, and the plum is shown isolated against a plain background. The overall shape is nearly perfect sphere, with no significant dents or protrusions. The object gives the impression of a dense, ripe fruit with a firm exterior.
description: A glossy, dark blue-gray plum with reddish-brown mottling and a smooth, reflective surface. The fruit is spherical and dense, with no visible stem or leaves.
description_view_0: This view shows a mostly uniform dark blue-gray surface with a strong central highlight and subtle reddish-brown patches.
description_view_1: Here, the plum displays more pronounced reddish-brown mottling on the upper left, with the highlight slightly off-center.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a slightly lighter area near the highlight, with less visible mottling and a smoother appearance overall.
description_view_3: The plum in this view has the most visible reddish-brown area on the upper right, contrasting with the otherwise dark, glossy skin.
